metadata.title: Generate a governed SR8 compiler prompt for a sales_offer artifact using the memory_lens, capable of handling multi_runtime_confusion chaos input with explicit validation gates.

mission.primary_objective: Generate a governed SR8 compiler prompt for a sales_offer artifact using the memory_lens, capable of handling multi_runtime_confusion chaos input with explicit validation gates.
mission.success_definition: The compiled prompt contains all five required sections (Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract).; Each section is fully populated with SR8-compilable directives.; Validation gates are explicitly defined and can reject malformed input.; The prompt is self-contained and can be directly used by SR8 compiler to produce a sales_offer artifact.; No hallucinated or fabricated data; all inferred content is marked with [inferred] tag.

in_scope.item: Parse the raw intent from a US-based developer, resolve missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a structured prompt that SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. The output must be a valid sr8_compiler_prompt artifact with depth tier D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE targeting Codex runtime.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: The compiled prompt contains all five required sections (Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract).

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Each section is fully populated with SR8-compilable directives.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are explicitly defined and can reject malformed input.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: The prompt is self-contained and can be directly used by SR8 compiler to produce a sales_offer artifact.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 5
gate.pass_condition: No hallucinated or fabricated data; all inferred content is marked with [inferred] tag.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.raw_intent: Generate a governed SR8 compiler prompt for a sales_offer artifact using the memory_lens, capable of handling multi_runtime_confusion chaos input with explicit validation gates.

compilation_rules.item: Reject incomplete intake with a repair receipt.

output_artifact_contract.item: sections: objective: string describing the goal of the sales_offer artifact; scope: string defining boundaries and included/excluded elements; constraints: array of strings with explicit validation gates; success_criteria: array of strings with measurable conditions; output_contract: object specifying the expected output structure

validation_gates: gate_1: check for missing context and infer using memory_lens; gate_2: reject if runtime_target is not Codex; gate_3: ensure all sections are non-empty; gate_4: flag ambiguous acceptance criteria for clarification

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
